meaning: n.[鍖朷涓冨彾鏍戠礌(鍙敤浣滈槻鏅掕嵂鑶忕殑鍘熸枡)
examples: The main contents of the thesis are as follows:1. Fluorescence spectra and UV absorption spectra of aesculin were studied.
In chapter 2, the hydrolysis rate constant and activation energy of main active ingredient in Cortex Fraxini aesculin was studied.
Method: the study was performed by intestinal perfusion model in rats to observe the effect of absorption sites and concentrations on absorption kinetics of aesculin.
